subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-07-02
subcodes.first_line: It is highly important for man to raise a family. So long as he is young, because of youthful self-complacency
subcodes.first_line_orig: تاسیس عائله خیلی مهم است تا انسان جوانست از غرور جوانی ملتفت نمیشود ولی چون پیر شد
subcodes.subjects: @parents and children; youth; families, @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @education of children; moral education, @love and unity, @order; organization; tact; deliberation [tadbir]
